description: baseline: faithful Python port of settings-store.js from A1-AI-Core. 5 ops (getSettings, updateSettings, redactedForClient, resolveModelPolicy, defaults). 12 cases per-case field set, all 100. Per-test tmp dataDir (created + cleaned by eval). Key design fix: each test case is a SEQUENCE of operations against a shared dataDir (workflow.run_workflow({operations: [...]})) so setup + assertion are in one self-contained call — first attempt had 75% because the gen script did per-test setup but the eval didn't, leading to inconsistent state. Solution: built the sequence into the workflow itself.
